title: The Vultures Circle

choices.text: Strategically leak contract details to wrestling journalists to spark a bidding war and put pressure on your current promotion

critSuccess.narrative: The story hits the sheets and creates massive buzz. Multiple promotions start a bidding war for your services!

success.narrative: The leak gets some attention. Your agent reports increased interest from rival promotions.

failure.narrative: The leak backfires. Your current promotion is furious and your reputation takes a hit.

critFailure.narrative: The leak is traced back to you. The locker room turns against you and the promoter threatens legal action.

choices.text: Maintain complete professionalism by refusing to comment on contract rumors and keeping all negotiations private

success.narrative: You maintain your professionalism. The speculation dies down and you keep your options open.

choices.text: Defer entirely to your agent, letting them work behind the scenes to secure the best possible deal without your direct involvement

success.narrative: Your agent works behind the scenes. Several offers come in over the next few weeks.

description: Whispers are spreading through the locker room and wrestling media about your contract situation. With your current deal nearing its end, rival promotions are circling like vultures, waiting for the perfect moment to strike. The wrestling sheets are speculating about your future, and your current promotion is getting nervous. How you handle this situation could determine your next career move - whether that's a massive raise, a jump to a bigger company, or burning bridges with your current employer.

title: Reckless Opponent

choices.text: Approach the booker backstage and formally request a different opponent, citing safety concerns about your current opponent's reckless reputation

success.narrative: The booker listens and switches your opponent. Crisis averted.

failure.narrative: The booker dismisses your concerns. You look like you're ducking the match.

choices.text: Pull your opponent aside for a serious backstage conversation to establish boundaries and demand they work safer with you

success.narrative: Your confrontation intimidates them. They agree to take it easier in the ring.

failure.narrative: The confrontation escalates into a backstage brawl. Security has to separate you.

choices.text: Ignore the warnings and proceed with the match as scheduled, trusting your skills to protect yourself in the ring

success.narrative: The match goes fine. Your opponent respects your courage.

description: Your upcoming match is causing concern throughout the locker room. Your scheduled opponent has developed a dangerous reputation for being careless and reckless in the ring - taking unnecessary risks, working too stiff, and having injured several wrestlers recently. Veteran wrestlers are warning you to be careful. You need to decide how to handle this situation before you step into the ring with someone who might put your career at risk.

title: Locker Room Argument

choices.text: Insert yourself into the argument aggressively, either to establish dominance over both wrestlers or to force a resolution through intimidation

success.narrative: You establish dominance. The locker room knows not to mess with you.

failure.narrative: You get embarrassed in front of everyone. Your reputation suffers.

choices.text: Deliberately avoid the confrontation entirely, leaving the area and refusing to get involved in the locker room drama

success.narrative: You avoid the drama. Some respect your maturity, others see it as weakness.

choices.text: Use your respected position as a locker room leader to step in and help both parties find a peaceful resolution to their conflict

success.narrative: Your leadership resolves the conflict. The locker room respects you even more.

description: Tensions boil over backstage as two established wrestlers engage in a heated, escalating argument. Other wrestlers are taking sides, and the locker room atmosphere has become tense and divided. The dispute started over something minor but has grown into a serious confrontation that threatens team chemistry and morale. Your reputation and standing in the locker room could be affected by how you choose to handle - or avoid - this volatile situation.

title: Wellness Test

choices.text: Submit to the wellness test immediately and accept whatever results come from it

success.narrative: The test comes back positive. You've failed the wellness policy.

choices.text: Attempt to avoid the wellness test through excuses, scheduling conflicts, or other evasive maneuvers

success.narrative: You successfully avoid the test this time. But they'll be watching you closer now.

failure.narrative: They catch you trying to dodge. That's a strike in itself plus you still have to test.

description: You receive an unexpected summons from the promotion's medical staff - you've been randomly selected for a mandatory wellness policy test. This screening checks for performance-enhancing drugs and other banned substances. Given your recent struggles with substance issues, this test could have serious consequences for your career if you fail. Three strikes under the wellness policy means automatic termination of your contract. You need to decide how to handle this unexpected and potentially career-threatening situation.

title: PED Offer

choices.text: Agree to purchase and use the performance-enhancing drugs to gain a competitive edge in your matches

success.narrative: You start using PEDs. Your performance improves but now you're playing a dangerous game.

choices.text: Politely but firmly decline the PED offer, explaining that you prefer to succeed on your own natural abilities

success.narrative: You decline. The offerer understands and respects your decision.

choices.text: Report the PED dealer to promotion management to protect the integrity of the locker room and the business

success.narrative: You report the PED dealer to management. They appreciate your integrity.

description: A shady, well-connected character in the locker room corners you with an offer that's hard to refuse. They're offering performance-enhancing drugs (PEDs) that could dramatically improve your strength, stamina, and recovery time - potentially elevating your career to the next level. However, using PEDs comes with serious risks: failing wellness tests, long-term health consequences, and the moral compromise of cheating. Your decision here could define your career trajectory and legacy in the wrestling business.

title: Fan Encounter

choices.text: Dedicate time to personally sign autographs for every fan waiting, making each person feel valued and appreciated

success.narrative: The fans love you! Your merch sales spike this week.

failure.narrative: You sign some autographs but seem rushed. Fans are disappointed.

choices.text: Avoid eye contact and keep walking briskly through the airport without acknowledging the fans

success.narrative: You avoid the fans. Some understand you're busy, others complain online.

choices.text: Take selfies with multiple fans and immediately post them to your social media accounts to maximize exposure

success.narrative: Your social media post goes viral! Fans appreciate the accessibility.

description: While traveling between shows, a large group of passionate fans recognizes you at the airport. They've been waiting for hours hoping to catch a glimpse of wrestlers passing through. The crowd is excited but orderly, pulling out phones, autograph books, and merchandise for you to sign. This is a perfect opportunity to build your fanbase and boost your merchandise sales, but you're also tired from travel and have a tight connection to make. How you handle these fans could affect your public image and bottom line.

title: Injury Setback

choices.text: Immediately visit a medical professional to assess the injury severity and follow their treatment recommendations

success.narrative: The doctor recommends rest. You'll heal properly but miss some shows.

choices.text: Ignore the pain and work your scheduled match, relying on adrenaline and toughness to get through the performance

success.narrative: You tough it out and work the match. The crowd respects your heart.

failure.narrative: The injury worsens mid-match. You have to be helped to the back.

choices.text: Notify the promotion that you need time off to properly rest and recover from the injury before returning to action

success.narrative: You take the time you need. You'll come back stronger.

description: During a routine training session, you feel a sharp, familiar pain - you've aggravated an old injury that you thought was fully healed. The pain is significant enough to affect your in-ring performance, and you have a match scheduled soon. The promotion is counting on you, but wrestling hurt could worsen the injury and potentially endanger your long-term career. You need to make a difficult decision about whether to seek medical attention, push through the pain, or take time off to properly heal.

title: Scout Notice

choices.text: Immediately sign the developmental contract with {promotion.name} and begin your journey to the major leagues

success.narrative: You sign the contract! Your career is about to take off.

choices.text: Attempt to negotiate for a higher starting salary ($500/week) and better contract terms before committing

success.narrative: Your negotiation pays off. You get a better starting salary.

failure.narrative: Your negotiation fails. They withdraw the offer entirely.

choices.description: Try to leverage the deal into $500/week.

choices.text: Politely decline the developmental offer and continue building your reputation on the independent wrestling circuit

success.narrative: You stay true to the indie scene. Your reputation grows in the underground.

description: A talent scout from {promotion.name}, one of the major wrestling promotions, has been watching your indie matches and is impressed with your potential. They approach you with an exciting opportunity: a developmental contract worth $300 per week for 16 weeks. This could be your big break into the major leagues, offering professional training, exposure to larger audiences, and a pathway to stardom. However, you'll be starting from the bottom of the card in a highly competitive environment. Your response to this offer could determine whether you make it to the big time or remain on the indie circuit.

title: Gimmick Going Stale

choices.text: Develop and debut a completely new character, with different mannerisms, attire, and personality to refresh your presentation

success.narrative: The new gimmick is a hit! Fans are talking about you again.

failure.narrative: The new gimmick falls flat. Fans prefer the old you.

choices.text: Commit even harder to your existing character, intensifying its key traits and elements to win the crowd back over

success.narrative: You lean into the gimmick harder. The dedication is noticed.

choices.text: Request a meeting with the booker to discuss your character direction and get their professional guidance on how to refresh your gimmick

success.narrative: The booker has some ideas. You'll work together on a refresh.

description: The energy in the arena has shifted. Where you used to get massive pops and crowd reactions, now there's an uncomfortable silence or lukewarm response when your music hits. Fans seem bored with your current character, and social media chatter about you has decreased significantly. Your gimmick - the personality and character you've been portraying - appears to be going stale. This is a critical moment where you need to either reinvent yourself, double down on your current persona, or seek creative guidance from the booker before your career momentum stalls completely.

title: Social Media Blowup

choices.text: Issue a sincere, public apology acknowledging the offensive nature of your past post and expressing your personal growth since then

success.narrative: Your apology is accepted. The scandal dies down quickly.

failure.narrative: Your apology seems insincere. The backlash continues.

choices.text: Refuse to apologize and stand firmly by your original statement, defending your right to express your opinions

success.narrative: Your boldness pays off. Fans respect that you stand by your words.

failure.narrative: Digging the hole deeper. The promotion issues a statement distancing from you.

choices.text: Delete the controversial post immediately and go completely silent on social media, hoping the controversy will blow over

success.narrative: The internet has a short attention span. Something else trends tomorrow.

description: A controversial social media post you made years ago has suddenly resurfaced and is going viral within the wrestling community. The post contains comments that are now being viewed as offensive or inappropriate by today's standards. Wrestling news sites are picking up the story, fans are debating your character on social media, and your promotion is asking questions. This scandal threatens to damage your reputation, affect your merchandise sales, and potentially jeopardize your standing with the company. You need to respond carefully to control the narrative before it spirals further out of control.

title: Van Broke Down

choices.text: Use your own money to pay for immediate repairs so you can get back on the road and make it to the show

success.narrative: The van is fixed but your wallet is lighter. You make the show.

choices.text: Leave the broken van behind and attempt to hitchhike with passing motorists to get to the venue in time

success.narrative: A kind fan recognizes you and gives you a ride. You arrive just in time.

failure.narrative: You can't get a ride. You miss the show and anger the promoter.

choices.text: Accept that you won't make it to the venue and call the promoter to explain the situation

success.narrative: You call ahead and explain. The promoter is understanding... this time.

description: Disaster strikes on the way to your next indie booking - the van you're traveling in has broken down on a remote stretch of highway. The show starts in just a few hours, and you're miles away from the venue with no other transportation options. The promoter is expecting you for a featured match, and missing the show could damage your reputation on the indie circuit. Your options are limited: pay for expensive repairs out of your own pocket, try to hitchhike with strangers, or accept that you'll miss the show. This is the harsh reality of life on the independent wrestling grind.

title: Promoter Didn't Pay

choices.text: Confront the promoter directly and aggressively, demanding immediate payment for yourself and the other wrestlers

success.narrative: You intimidate the promoter into paying. He'll think twice before stiffing wrestlers.

failure.narrative: The confrontation gets heated. Security escorts you out. No pay.

choices.text: Accept the financial loss and walk away from the situation to avoid further conflict and stress

success.narrative: You decide it's not worth the trouble. Word spreads that this promoter can't be trusted.

choices.text: Take to social media to publicly expose the promoter's unethical behavior and warn other wrestlers

success.narrative: Your post goes viral. Other wrestlers share similar stories. The promoter is blacklisted.

failure.narrative: The promoter threatens to sue for defamation. You delete the post.

description: The show has ended and the locker room is buzzing with anger - the promoter is attempting to leave without paying any of the wrestlers. This is a nightmare scenario that every indie wrestler fears: performing in good faith only to be stiffed by an unscrupulous promoter trying to skip out with the gate money. The other wrestlers are looking for someone to take the lead on confronting this situation. Your decision on how to handle this could determine whether you get paid, whether the promoter faces consequences, and how you're viewed by your peers in the wrestling community.

title: Faction Power Struggle

choices.text: Make a bold power play by publicly challenging the current faction leader for control of the group

success.narrative: You successfully challenge for leadership. The faction is yours now.

failure.narrative: The challenge fails. You're kicked out of the faction.

choices.text: Publicly reaffirm your loyalty to the current faction leader and help defend their position against challengers

success.narrative: Your loyalty is noted. The leader trusts you more now.

choices.text: Formally exit the faction on good terms to avoid the political drama and forge your own path

success.narrative: You leave on good terms. Time to forge your own path.

description: The political landscape within your faction has become increasingly volatile. The current leader, who has held power for some time, is showing signs of weakness and indecision. Other members are quietly questioning their authority, and rumors of a mutiny are circulating. This is a critical moment where the faction's future direction hangs in the balance. You need to decide whether to make a power play and challenge for leadership, demonstrate loyalty to preserve your position, or leave the group entirely to avoid the inevitable drama. Your choice will significantly impact your standing and future storylines.

title: Mentor Offer

choices.text: Gratefully accept the veteran's mentorship offer and commit to learning everything they can teach you about the business

success.narrative: You take a young wrestler under your wing. Passing on knowledge feels good.

choices.text: Politely decline the mentorship offer, explaining that you need to remain focused on your own individual career path

success.narrative: You politely decline. You need to focus on your own matches right now.

description: One of the respected veterans in the locker room has approached you with a generous offer. They've been watching your matches and see potential in you that could be developed further. They want to take you under their wing as a mentor - teaching you the finer points of psychology, helping you improve your promo skills, and guiding you through the political landscape of the wrestling business. This is a rare opportunity to learn from someone who has survived decades in the industry, but it will also require significant time and commitment that might distract from your own career focus.

title: Burnout Warning

choices.text: Book time off for a proper vacation to rest, recover, and mentally recharge away from the wrestling business

success.narrative: The time off does wonders. You return refreshed and ready.

choices.text: Seek professional mental health support from a therapist who can help you process the emotional toll of the wrestling lifestyle

success.narrative: Therapy helps you work through your issues. Mental health is important.

failure.narrative: You try therapy but you're not ready to open up yet.

choices.text: Push through the burnout and continue working your scheduled matches, hoping the feeling will pass on its own

success.narrative: You push through. But at what cost?

description: The relentless pace of professional wrestling has finally taken its toll. After months of constant travel, brutal matches, and never-ending promotional obligations, you're experiencing severe burnout. You find it hard to get motivated for matches, your energy levels are depleted, and mentally you're struggling to maintain the passion that drove you to this career. The physical and emotional exhaustion is affecting your performance and happiness. This is a serious career crossroads - you need to take action to recover or risk permanent damage to both your health and your career trajectory.

description: While grinding on the indies without a major contract, a local promoter offers you a risky but potentially lucrative opportunity. They want to put you in a high-stakes main event that could generate significant buzz and exposure - if it goes well. The match involves a dangerous opponent with a reputation for stiffness, and there's little upfront pay. However, if you deliver a spectacular performance, it could go viral and attract attention from bigger promotions. This is the kind of gamble that can make or break an indie career.

The favor involves sticking your neck out professionally and could either generate major buzz or backfire spectacularly. How you handle this request will affect your reputation and relationships on the indie circuit.

This could be your chance to prove you belong on bigger stages, but there's also the risk of bombing in front of a large crowd and damaging your credibility. The eyes of the wrestling world will be watching to see if you can handle the pressure.
